name: Chili Casserole
recipeIngredient: 16 Ounces Can Tomato And Juice (or more as desired)
4 Teaspoons Chili Powder (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown onion in butter in a skillet until translucent.
2. Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking up any clumps.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Add remaining ingredients except cheese, stirring well to combine.
5. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
6. Transfer mixture to a 3-quart baking dish.
7. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 50 minutes, or until the casserole is heated through and bubbly.
